reasoning_model_1: The audio accurately reflects the text 'I just feel this plan is the best.' The delivery is deliberate and paced. model_comparison: Model 1 followed the specific instruction to emphasize the word 'is'. It used elongation and pausing to highlight the word effectively within the sentence structure. The word 'is' in Model 2's output was unstressed and blended into the background of the sentence.
